title: Minimum Operations to Make a Subsequence
titleCn: 得到子序列的最少操作次数

testcases.input: target = [5,1,3], arr = [9,4,2,3,4] Output: 2 Explanation: You can add 5 and 1 in such a way that makes arr = [5,9,4,1,2,3,4], then target will be a subsequence of arr.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can add 5 and 1 in such a way that makes arr = [5,9,4,1,2,3,4], then target will be a subsequence of arr.
